name: Google announced Calico as an aging-focused company
summary: Google announced Calico as a company focused on health and well-being, with aging and associated diseases as its initial public focus.
significance_note: Marks a major technology-company entry into aging biology. It is field activity, not evidence that an intervention improves aging outcomes.

surface_routing.rationale: Field-wide historical anchor that should be visible to State of the Field review as context, without changing evidence or outlook surfaces.
